character.name:
Grotesque asymmetric hybrid monster, isometric pixel art, gothic 
horror. Bloated irregular body covered in dark magenta-purple flesh 
#2a0a28, outlined with pulsing pink veins #aa2a80. Four spike 
protrusions jutting out from the body at angles. Multiple small 
glowing pink eyes #ff7ac0 scattered across the body surface. 
No clear head or limbs — pure aberrant blob silhouette, slightly 
floating above ground. Colors: deep purple-maroon body, hot pink 
glow. Unsettling, chaotic shape. Crisp pixel art, dark background, 
transparent if possible.
